description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build&Release that triggers on push events with tags matching 'v*'. The workflow consists of three jobs: build-windows, build-android, and release-pkg. The build-windows job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for different targets, architectures, editions, and compilers. The build-android job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy for different editions. The release-pkg job depends on the build-windows and build-android jobs, downloads the artifacts, and creates a release with the build artifacts.
